metadata.description: Icelandic personal-finance literacy (fjármálalæsi) skills — payslips, pensions, verðtrygging, savings, taxes, safety nets

plugins.name: fjarmalalaesi
plugins.description: Icelandic personal-finance literacy: payslip and wage-rights math, the three-pillar pension system, verðtryggð mortgage modeling, séreignarsparnaður trade-offs, savings landscape, stacked staðgreiðsla tax math, and safety nets — with validated stdlib-only Python scripts.
